name: Takdir Kedua
overview:
"Why am I back to yesterday?!"

Lawyer Arif is attacked on his way home from work. As everything fades to black, he thinks it's the end. But when he suddenly wakes up, he finds himself back on the day before the attack! Trapped in a time loop, with death repeating over and over again, he must uncover the mastermind to break free. This time, can he escape his fate?
